training_status: experienced - 16 years on and off, PPL program, 6 days per week

benefits.description: Lost 7 lbs in 6 weeks during cutting phase (175 to 183 lbs, retaining muscle from bulk). Previous cut May 2024-March 2025: 230 to 175 lbs (55 lbs total). Body fat reduced from ~18% to ~13%.
Retained muscle mass during aggressive cut with 800-900 kcal deficit. InBody scale showed skeletal muscle mass increase during recent cut.
Visually noticeable reduction in love handles/sides.

side_effects.description: Bad acid reflux from Tirzepatide early in protocol, managed with supplements and dietary modifications

protocol_notes: Currently on week 5 of 8-12 week total cycle. Previous Tirzepatide-only phase (May 2024-March 2025) resulted in 55 lbs fat loss. March-May 2025 bulk phase with no peptides (7 lbs gained, mostly water). Current cutting phase (May-June 2025) uses stack of 4 compounds at 800-900 kcal deficit with PPL 6-day workout. AOD-9604 injected locally on love handles. Plans to obtain InBody scan and bloodwork for IGF-1 levels. Reconstituted with 5mg bottle and 3ml bac water. Acknowledges uncertainty about AOD-9604 efficacy due to mixed reviews.
